reason: Downstream conflates MarketingRegion with Region by saying '22 distinct values matching the 22 Region labels', implying they are the same set, and incorrectly states geographic RegionID is dropped in DWH — neither claim is in the source.
proposed_fix: FK to Dictionary.MarketingRegion. Segments countries by marketing strategy (e.g. 'Arabic' cuts across Asia/Africa regions). Distinct from geographic RegionID. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.Country)
